titleStmt.title: SII 17.659: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 659. (A.R. No. 608 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Rāmanāthasvāmin temple.
This inscription begins with the praśasti, Pugaḻśūḻnda puṇari, etc., of the king.

It records a gift of tax-free land for gardening by the sabhā of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam. It also refers to a previous gift in the 32nd regnal year of the king (1102 A.D.) by the Peruṅguṟi-sabhā of the same place for performing the sacred bath and for food offerings to god Tirunārāyaṇapurattāḻvān on the day of Puṇarpūśa, the birth day asterismcf. A.R. Ep. 1947-48, Int., p. 2 where the star on the day of accession of Kulōttugga I is considered to be Pushya which is the next after Punarpūśa i.e., Punarvasu.(?) of Kulōttugga I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇari Akaḻ cūḻṉta puviyil poṉ vum taṉ neminaṭappa viḷaṅku jeyamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu
puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu va muṉaik kontaḷa Aracar tam taḷam Iriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai
ma temarukamalap pūmakaḷ putumaiyum poṉṉiyāṭai ppāvaiyum tanimaiyuṉ tavirttup punitaṟ ṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟc cūṭit taṉnaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭa
maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai cella veṇkuṭai yirunilaviḷākam veṇkaṇṇu tenātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa yorutani meruviṟ puli vi
tiṟaiviṭu taṉta kalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya ṉ karun talai paruntalaittiṭa taṉ poṉnakar puṟattiṭaikkiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkula piṟai pol niṟpiḻai
poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticai niṟutti muttiṉ calāka teṉṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭa malaināṭṭu cāveṟellām tanivicumpeṟa māveṟiya taṉ varu taṉit talai vaṇaṅka kuṟukalar kulaiya koṭṭāṟuḷppaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppayattalaṅkaḷum pola viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka virasiṅhāsa
ṇṭu patiyāna taṉaicceṉāpati maṇṭalikaḷ kāmayaṉ Eṇṭi taṇan ceruc ceṉāpati pā 3 10 2 Āvatu tiyākavallivaḷanāṭṭu mimalai śrī jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom tirunārāyaṇa purattāḻvānukku śrī kolotuṅka coḻadevar tirunakṣatriyai tiruppuṇarpūcattu ṉāḷ tirumañcaṉam ceytaruḷukaikkum peruntiruamutu ceytaruḷukaikkum tiruc caṇṭilum tiru
śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 2 Āvatu kaṇāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu da[ śami] ṇāṟṟu 2 caturattu tenkiḻakkaṭaiya rājentracoḻan tirunantavanam kamukunilam Iraṇṭu mā Innilam Iraṇṭu māvum cantirātittavarai Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭu Innilattukku maṟṟu Eppeṟpaṭṭatuṅ koḷḷappeṟātomāka Iṟaiyiliceytu kallil veṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturveti maṅkalattu sa
tevatānam nilam tecavallappāṭi Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa ni ruḷu yār vitikku kiḻakku yāṉ paṇiyālum Ivvūr maddhyasthaṉ caṅkattimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I kum Ārāvamutu śrī rāmaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Itu pāratāyaṉ Iṭṭikāmaṉ tiruvaraṅkamārāyaṉeṉ sayijñaippaṭi peṟṟān tevar vācciyaṉ kṣattu teyamuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu tevan taruṇentucekaraṉ sayijñaiyā
ṭaiya nilam m 3 catirattu terkkaṭaiya nilam nilam m merkkaṭaiya kkiramavittaṉ sayijñai māṭṭeṟinteṉ caṅkattimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vācciyaṉ Aṅki vi ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai noṭṭūr ppirāṉ kiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Itu kāmakkāṇi poṟcotaṉ kākuttaṉ sayijñaikku māṭṭeṟinten caṅkattima
tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyān vinācakan Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 17.659 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
